query:
INSERT INTO island_guides (placeId, name, slug, contentType, atoll, overview, published, featured, displayOrder)
VALUES 
  (1, 'Eydhafushi', 'eydhafushi', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Eydhafushi is a beautiful island in Baa Atoll.', 1, 0, 0),
  (2, 'Hithigili', 'hithigili', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Hithigili is a beautiful island in Baa Atoll.', 1, 0, 0),
  (3, 'Villingili', 'villingili', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Villingili is a beautiful island in Baa Atoll.', 1, 0, 0),
  (4, 'Kudarikilu', 'kudarikilu', 'island', 'Baa Atoll', 'Kudarikilu is a beautiful island in Baa Atoll.', 1, 0, 0);
